settings.title: 100% Grass Fed Tallow
settings.text: is nature's perfect skin care product. Tallow supplies complete nutrition directly to the skin, resulting in optimal skin health, and includes vitamins A, D, E, K, B12 and more. The primary ingredient in our balm is tallow obtained from 100% grass fed cows. Tallow has been used as a healing skin care product since the beginning of time, even by our very own pioneer ancestors.

settings.title: Natural Ingredients
settings.text: Our Tallow Balm is all natural, 100% organic, and is rendered from the fat of 100% grass fed cows, making it completely edible! (Although we recommend applying the balm directly to the skin). All of the ingredients come directly from nature with no added chemicals, preservatives, or additives. You can feel safe knowing that you are not putting anything foreign or synthetic on your body. Our Tallow Balm is thick and creamy and absorbs directly into the skin. You will love that it does not leave your skin feeling greasy!

settings.title: Vitamins
settings.text:
Vitamin A is renowned for its ability to smooth wrinkles, lighten sunspots, and calm acne. With regular use of our tallow balm, you can achieve a youthful complexion and say goodbye to pesky blemishes. Additionally, vitamin A helps balance oil production, resulting in a radiant and well-hydrated skin.

Vitamin D supports cell growth and repair while nourishing your skin from within.

Vitamin E provides antioxidant protection against free radicals and helps maintain youthful-looking skin.

Vitamin K aids in reducing dark circles and under-eye puffiness, giving you a refreshed appearance.

Vitamin B12 plays a crucial role in skin health by providing essential nutrients for collagen production and by helping to maintain the skin's natural moisture balance. Vitamin B12 also helps to promote healthy cell growth, which can help to reduce the appearance of wrinkles and other signs of aging.

settings.title: Who We Are
settings.text: White Sparrow Farmacy began as a family based company in the PNW, when we couldn’t find a natural or optimally beneficial skin care product. Our family has been turning to traditional methods these past few years and we are more than excited to share with you our tallow, returning to our roots and tradition steeped in our Pioneer Heritage.
